mr_title: Show full order history on checkout confirmation
author: dev.jane
diff:
--- a/checkout/views.py
+++ b/checkout/views.py
@@ def confirm_checkout(request, cart):
-    orders = Order.objects.filter(user=cart.user).select_related('items')[:5]
+    orders = Order.objects.filter(user=cart.user)
+    for order in orders:
+        # load each order's line items individually
+        order.line_items = OrderItem.objects.filter(order_id=order.id)
     return render(request, 'confirm.html', {'orders': orders})

mr_title: Add recent user activity to profile page
author: dev.john
diff:
--- a/profile/views.py
+++ b/profile/views.py
@@ def user_profile(request, user_id):
     user = User.objects.get(id=user_id)
-    activities = Activity.objects.filter(user=user)[:10]
+    activities = Activity.objects.filter(user=user)
+    for activity in activities:
+        # fetch detailed logs for each activity
+        activity.details = ActivityLog.objects.filter(activity_id=activity.id)
     return render(request, 'profile.html', {'user': user, 'activities': activities})

mr_title: Add daily digest email to notifications
author: dev.mira
diff:
--- a/notifications/tasks.py
+++ b/notifications/tasks.py
@@ def send_daily_digest():
     subscribers = Subscriber.objects.filter(active=True)
     for sub in subscribers:
+        # look up each subscribers unread notifications one by one
+        unread = Notification.objects.filter(user_id=sub.user_id, read=False)
+        sub.unread_count = unread.count()
     return subscribers
